primary_complexity_drivers: basic clarification of authentication method (AD group-based access)
no technical changes or troubleshooting evidenced
results.complexity_summary: This ticket appears to be a simple user question about how to log into Impresa. Support clarified that Impresa access is handled via the customer's Active Directory and ICIS_xxxx group membership rather than a separate Impresa username/password. There is no evidence of troubleshooting, access provisioning, configuration changes, or multi-step validation. The work was essentially informational and resolved quickly.
evidence: Agent explanation: Impresa login follows the user's PC/network login and is controlled by Active Directory ICIS_xxxx group membership
No additional technical steps, errors, or remediation actions recorded after the clarification
Ticket contains only a brief customer email and two short agent comments
noise_factors: Minimal conversational replies with no added technical content
results.duration_vs_complexity_note: The ticket closed quickly and the recorded work is only a straightforward explanation, not an indicator of any deeper technical complexity.
